name: Comic Rocker Reader BETA
description: Never miss a webcomic page again!

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src https://www.comic-rocket.com http://localhost:3000 https://localhost:3000; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' blob:; img-src 'self' https://www.comic-rocket.com data:;
